name: seven-samurai-agents
description: Collection of specialized Claude Code agents and skills for development workflows

plugins.name: general
plugins.description: Language-agnostic agents for software architecture and system design

plugins.name: python-development
plugins.description: Python backend development agents and skills with Clean Architecture, FastAPI, Celery, and library development

plugins.name: flutter-development
plugins.description: Flutter and Dart development agents for mobile app development and code review with Clean Architecture, BLoC+Freezed, and Result<T> error handling

plugins.name: nextjs-development
plugins.description: Next.js frontend development agents for building and reviewing apps with Two-layer Architecture, Zustand stores, DataAccess pattern, and Either monad error handling
